backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Tool and UserProfile types, access control integration, in-memory storage for tools and user profiles, and seeded initial data with 10 example AI tools (Stable Diffusion, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, etc.).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage, category page, tool detail page, search, styling) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files describing their purpose, functionality, and key implementation details for components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, borders, and other UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags for RankAI application, including title, description, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, categories, category detail, tool detail, search, admin, and 404 pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied message with shield icon displayed when non-admin users attempt to access restricted pages, includes link back to homepage.
frontend/src/components/AddToolForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for adding new AI tools with fields for name, slug, description, website, rating, pricing, and array inputs for categories, tags, bestFor, pros, and cons with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/CategoryCard.tsx: Card component displaying category name with sparkles icon and tool count, linking to category detail page with hover scale animation.
frontend/src/components/FilterDrawer.tsx: A mobile-friendly drawer component that slides up from the bottom to display sorting and pricing filter controls, with a backdrop overlay and close button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying social media links (Twitter, GitHub), copyright notice, and a "Built with caffeine.ai" attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper that includes Navbar, Footer, and conditionally shows ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that toggles between login/logout states using Internet Identity, handles authentication errors, and clears the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: Slide-in mobile navigation menu with links to Categories and Submit Tool pages, plus theme toggle and login button.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop navigation links, theme toggle, login button, and mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProConsList.tsx: Two-column grid layout displaying pros (with check icons) and cons (with X icons) for a tool.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new authenticated users to enter their name, using a form submission to save the profile.
frontend/src/components/RankingBadge.tsx: Circular badge displaying a tool's rank number with special colors for top 3 positions (gold, silver, bronze).
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with icon that either calls an onSearch callback or navigates to the search page with query parameters.
Form controls for sorting tools (top-rated, most-popular, free) and filtering by pricing type (free, freemium, paid) using select and checkbox inputs.
frontend/src/components/TagPill.tsx: Small rounded pill component for displaying a single tag with secondary styling.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button that toggles between light and dark themes, displaying sun/moon icons with smooth transitions.
frontend/src/components/ToolCard.tsx: Clickable card component displaying tool information including name, description, pricing badge, categories, rating, and optional ranking badge for top 3 tools.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state changes and initializing access control with admin tokens from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including tools (by slug, category, search), user profiles, and admin status checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Tailwind layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, font imports (Inter, Instrument Serif), and custom animations (fade-in, slide-in-right, slide-up).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin-only page for submitting new tools with authentication and authorization checks, displaying AddToolForm when access is granted.
frontend/src/pages/CategoriesPage.tsx: Displays all tool categories as cards with tool counts, computed from aggregating categories across all tools.
frontend/src/pages/CategoryPage.tsx: Shows tools filtered by category with sorting (top-rated, most-popular, free) and pricing filters, supporting both desktop sidebar and mobile drawer layouts.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with search bar, popular categories grid, and trending tools sorted by ranking score.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: 404 error page displaying a centered message with a button to return to the homepage.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Displays search results for tools based on query parameter, showing a search bar and list of matching tools or empty state.
frontend/src/pages/ToolDetailPage.tsx: React component that displays detailed information about a specific AI tool, including name, description, pricing, rating, tags, pros/cons, best-for section, and related tools. Uses TanStack Router for routing and fetches tool data by slug.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme with OKLCH color system, Inter and Instrument Serif fonts, extended spacing/shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing RankAI as an AI directory with smart recommendations, built with React/TypeScript frontend and Motoko backend on Internet Computer, featuring tool search, category browsing, authentication, and premium minimal SaaS UI inspired by tpot.cc.
